{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Russia women's national football team}}
{{pp-pc|small=yes}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=May 2026}}

| Name                     = Russia
| Badge                    = Coat of Arms of the Russian Federation 2.svg
| Badge_size               = 180px
| Nickname                 = Сборная / ''Sbornaya''<br/>(The National Team)<br/>Наши парни / ''Nashi parni'' (Our Boys)
| Association              = [[Russian Football Union|Rossiyskiy Futbolnyy Soyuz]] (RFS)<br>Российский Футбольный Союз 
| Confederation            = [[Union of European Football Associations|UEFA]] (Europe)
| Coach                    = [[Valery Karpin]]
| Captain                  = [[Aleksandr Golovin (footballer)|Aleksandr Golovin]]
| Most caps                = [[Sergei Ignashevich]] (127)
| Top scorer               = [[Artem Dzyuba]] (31){{efn-lr|group=scorer|[[Oleg Blokhin]], who scored 42 goals for the Soviet Union, is recognised by FIFA as Russia's top scorer, as the statistics of the Soviet Union were inherited by its [[Succession of states#Soviet Union|successor state]] Russia.}}
| Home Stadium             = [[#Home venues record|Various]]
| FIFA Trigramme           = RUS
| FIFA Rank                = {{FIFA World Rankings|RUS}}
| FIFA max                 = 3
| FIFA max date            = April 1996
| FIFA min                 = 70
| FIFA min date            = June 2018
| Elo Rank                 = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Russia}}
| Elo max                  = 7
| Elo max date             = August 2009
| Elo min                  = 50
| Elo min date             = 29 March 2017
| pattern_la1              = _thinwhiteborder
| pattern_b1               = _whitejogel
| pattern_ra1              = _thinwhiteborder
| pattern_sh1              = _whitejogel
| pattern_so1              = _whitejogel
