==Players==
===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[Exhibition game#Association football|friendly matches]] against [[Egypt national football team|Egypt]] on 28 May 2026, against [[Burkina Faso national football team|Burkina Faso]] on 5 June 2026 and against [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]] on 9 June 2026.<ref>{{cite web|publisher=Russian Football Union|url=https://www.rfs.ru/news/224267|title=На летний сбор национальной команды вызваны 32 футболиста|trans-title=32 footballers called up for the summer camp of the national team|date=18 May 2026|access-date=19 May 2026|language=ru}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|publisher=Russian Football Union|url=https://www.rfs.ru/news/224323|title=Иван Сергеев присоединился к сборной России|trans-title=Ivan Sergeyev joined the national team|date=23 May 2026|access-date=23 May 2026|language=ru}}</ref>
<br>''Caps and goals are correct {{asof|2026|6|09|lc=y}}, after the match against [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Matvey Safonov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|2|25|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=0|club=[[Paris Saint-Germain]]|clubnat=FRA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Stanislav Agkatsev]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|1|9|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[FC Krasnodar|Krasnodar]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Aleksandr Maksimenko (footballer, born 1998)|Aleksandr Maksimenko]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|3|19|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[FC Spartak Moscow|Spartak Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Anton Mitryushkin]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|2|8|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[FC Lokomotiv Moscow|Lokomotiv Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Denis Adamov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|2|20|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[FC Zenit Saint Petersburg|Zenit Saint Petersburg]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Igor Diveyev]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|9|27|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=1|club=[[FC Zenit Saint Petersburg|Zenit Saint Petersburg]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Aleksandr Silyanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|2|17|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=2|club=[[FC Lokomotiv Moscow|Lokomotiv Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Danil Krugovoy]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|5|28|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[PFC CSKA Moscow|CSKA Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ilya Vakhaniya]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|1|14|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=2|club=[[FC Krasnodar|Krasnodar]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Yevgeny Morozov (footballer)|Yevgeny Morozov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|2|14|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=1|club=[[FC Lokomotiv Moscow|Lokomotiv Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mingiyan Beveyev]]|age={{Birth date and age|1995|11|30|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=1|club=[[FC Baltika Kaliningrad|Baltika Kaliningrad]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Viktor Melyokhin]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|12|16|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[FC Rostov|Rostov]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kirill Danilov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|8|12|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[PFC CSKA Moscow|CSKA Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Aleksei Miranchuk]]|age={{Birth date and age|1995|10|17|df=y}}|caps=53|goals=11|club=[[Atlanta United FC|Atlanta United]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Anton Miranchuk]]|age={{Birth date and age|1995|10|17|df=y}}|caps=37|goals=7|club=[[FC Dynamo Moscow|Dynamo Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dmitri Barinov]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|9|11|df=y}}|caps=28|goals=0|club=[[PFC CSKA Moscow|CSKA Moscow]]|clubnat=RUS}}

{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up for the team within the last 12 months and are still available for selection.

;Notes
*<sup>INJ</sup> = Not part of the [[#Current squad|current squad]] due to injury.
*<sup>PRE</sup> = Preliminary squad/standby.
{{nat fs end}}

==Individual records==
{{Updated|19 March 2025.}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Russia - Record International Players |url=https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/rus-recintlp.html |website=RSSSF}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Russia.''
:''This list does not include players who represented the [[Russian Empire national football team#Records|Russian Empire]] (1910−1914), the [[Soviet Union national football team#Player records|Soviet Union]] (1924−1991) and the [[CIS national football team|CIS]] (1992).''

==Competitive record==

==Head-to-head record==

''Include the records of the [[Russian Empire national football team|Russian Empire]], the [[Soviet Union national football team|Soviet Union]] and the [[CIS national football team|CIS]] before 1992.''

As of 9 June 2026 after the match against [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]].

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFDACC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

'''Notes'''
{{notelist-lr|group=dynamo}}

==Honours==
===Global===
* '''[[Football at the Summer Olympics|Olympic Games]]'''
** {{gold1}} '''Gold Medal (2)''': [[Association football at the 1956 Summer Olympics|1956]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>, [[Football at the 1988 Summer Olympics|1988]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>
** {{bronze3}} Bronze Medal (3): [[Football at the 1972 Summer Olympics|1972]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>, [[Football at the 1976 Summer Olympics|1976]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>, [[Football at the 1980 Summer Olympics|1980]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>

===Continental===
* '''[[UEFA European Championship]]'''
** {{gold1}} '''Champions (1)''': [[1960 European Nations' Cup|1960]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>
** {{silver2}} Runners-up (3): [[1964 European Nations' Cup|1964]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>, [[UEFA Euro 1972|1972]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>, [[UEFA Euro 1988|1988]]<sup>'''1'''</sup>

===Friendly===
*'''[[Nehru Cup]]'''
** '''Champions (1)''': 1985<ref>{{cite web|first=Abhishek|last=Roy|url=https://twocircles.net/2007aug14/revisiting_some_memorable_moments_nehru_cup.html|title=Revisiting some of the memorable moments of the Nehru Cup|website=TwoCircles.net|publisher=IANS|date=14 August 2007|access-date=22 March 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220303093040/https://twocircles.net/2007aug14/revisiting_some_memorable_moments_nehru_cup.html|archive-date=3 March 2022}}</ref>
*'''[[Malta International Football Tournament]]'''
** '''Champions (1)''': 1996
*'''[[Lunar New Year Cup]]'''
** '''Champions (1)''': 1997
*'''[[Cyprus International Football Tournament]]'''
** '''Champions (1)''': 2003

===Awards===
* '''[[Gazzetta Sports Awards#Worldwide|Gazzetta Sports World Team of the Year]]''': 1979

===Summary===
{| class="wikitable" width=30% style="font-size:90%; text-align:center;"
|-
!Competition !!{{gold1}} !!{{silver2}} !!{{bronze3}} !!Total
|-
| align="left" |[[Olympic Games]]
|2||0||3||5
|-
| align="left" |[[UEFA European Championship]]
|1||3||0||4
|-
!Total!!3!!3!!3!!9
|}
;Notes:

==Further reading==
* Bennetts, Marc (2008). ''[https://books.google.com/books/about/Football_Dynamo.html?id=5cY-vmaJrO8C Football Dynamo&nbsp;– Modern Russia and the People's Game]''. London: Virgin Books. {{ISBN|0-7535-1319-6}}.

==External links==
{{Commons category}}
* [https://www.rfs.ru/ Official website] {{in lang|ru}}
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/RUS Russia FIFA profile]
* [https://www.uefa.com/nationalassociations/rus/ Russia UEFA profile]
* [http://www.rusteam.permian.ru/ Russia National Team] {{in lang|ru}}
* [http://www.rufoot.ru/ Russia National Team] {{in lang|ru}}
* [http://www.russia-matches.ucoz.ru Russia National football teams 1912–] {{in lang|ru}}
* [http://www.russiateam.com Russian National Football Team]
* [http://www.hep.lu.se/staff/smirnova//archive/team_e.html Russia national team 1912–] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180630164018/http://www.hep.lu.se/staff/smirnova//archive/team_e.html |date=30 June 2018 }}
* [https://www.rsssf.org/tablesr/rus-intres.html RSSSF archive of results 1912–2003]
* [https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/rus-recintlp.html RSSSF archive of most capped players and highest goalscorers]
* [http://www.planetworldcup.com/NATIONS/rus.html Planet World Cup archive of results in the World Cup]
* [http://www.planetworldcup.com/NATIONS/rus_squads.html Planet World Cup archive of squads in the World Cup]
* [http://www.planetworldcup.com/NATIONS/rus_qualify.html Planet World Cup archive of results in the World Cup qualifiers]
